children.title: About
lines: Two VCOs into a KORG-35 (REV.1) or OTA

children.title: VCO 1+2
lines: step is one octave; 8' is the reference.
Wave, PW per oscillator; menu adds Sync,

children.title: Mixer
lines: VCO 1/VCO 2 levels and the MG/T.EXT and
Menu: Sub, Ring, Noise, Color, ESP Aud,

children.title: Filter
lines: HPF and LPF Cut/Peak plus per-filter
LP only, HP only, Notch. REV switches

children.title: Envelopes
lines: envelope by default — opens the cutoff.

children.title: MG / ESP
lines: MG is the LFO: Freq and Shape, with
global Depth on the root page.
ESP turns line-in into pitch CV, an
envelope follower and a gate. Sig Lvl,
Lo Cut, Hi Cut, Threshold, CV Adj.

children.title: Patchbay
lines: Each row is one MS-20 input jack; pick
what source feeds it. Index 0 is the
Route ESP Audio into Ext Sig to feed
